personal.shortProfileSummary: Experienced backend developer specializing in building scalable microservices and robust API architectures.
personal.professionalSummary: Backend developer with 5 years of experience designing and implementing scalable microservices for high-traffic applications. Proficient in cloud infrastructure, database optimization, and API development. Demonstrated success in leading technical initiatives that improved system performance by 40% and reduced operational costs. Passionate about clean code, system design, and mentoring junior developers.
personal.additionalNote: Available for contract and full-time opportunities

industries.title: E-Commerce

education.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

achievements.text: Led redesign of payment processing microservices, reducing latency by 35% and increasing throughput to 10K req/s
Mentored team of 3 junior developers on system design patterns and code quality best practices
Implemented automated deployment pipeline reducing release time from 4 hours to 15 minutes
Developed and maintained 5 core microservices handling 50M+ daily requests across AWS infrastructure
Optimized database queries and implemented Redis caching, improving API response time by 40%
Designed Kubernetes deployment strategy for containerized services, improving system reliability to 99.95% uptime
Built RESTful APIs using Spring Boot for customer management and billing systems
Implemented automated testing suite achieving 75% code coverage and reducing production bugs by 30%
